role: Rising above injustice and recovering from loss
treePosition: As presented in the workbook, following Maat — see Sekher's provenance note on how this ordering was inferred.
teachingNotes: Remove suffering from injustices, losses, lack of closure.
Sowing the seeds of Justice in our lives to Reap the protection of the Divine Law.
The Power to Rise above the transgressions of others and recover from great losses with ironclad persistence.

hekau.text: I am a divine spiritual being, endowed with the ability to choose to live the 11 Laws of God. Injustices, therefore, have no lasting effects on my life.
Indulging anger, fear, worry, grief, and sadness nourish the quest for vengeance. Thank you God for making me peaceful by nature. I am the embodiment of Justice.
Not retribution or vengeance, but peace in knowing that the wrong doer is in the healing, and enlightening hands of God. And so am I.
Thank you, God for making me a divine being. Peaceful by nature. There's no suffering in me to wish upon the transgressor.
I take neither gain nor loss to heart. Peace is my nature.

I give thanks of your wisdom that has made a way for me to hold on to my oneness with all. A way for me to hold on to my love for the transgressor. I join you in seeking their redemption. It is love that prevails. It is love that corrects. It is love that heals.
